title: Virtualization
description: Hyper-V & VMware deployment, host configuration, virtual networking, and migration in production OT environments.

title: Windows Server / AD
description: Domain controller deployment, GPO, DNS/replication troubleshooting, FSMO roles, server builds from bare metal up.

title: Networking
description: VLAN design and documentation, switch configuration (Cisco, Hirschmann), enterprise WiFi with RADIUS/NPS.

title: Linux & Scripting
description: Day to day Linux administration alongside Windows, with PowerShell and Bash for automation and troubleshooting.

title: IaC & Containers
description: Hands-on practice with Terraform and Docker in a home lab environment, supplemented by completed coursework.

title: CI / CD
description: Working through Jenkins pipeline fundamentals as part of ongoing home lab practice and structured coursework.
